description: An integrity engineer checks the status of the cathodic protection system, which prevents corrosion on a steel gas pipeline.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the latest pipe-to-soil potential readings from remote test points along the pipeline.

expected_outcome.value: System gathers the latest voltage readings.

nodes.task_description: Compare the readings against the required protection levels (e.g., more negative than -850 mV).

expected_outcome.value: System identifies a section where the potential is less negative than the required level, indicating under-protection.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order for a technician to investigate the issue, which could be a rectifier failure or a damaged anode.

expected_outcome.value: System dispatches a technician to troubleshoot the cathodic protection system.
